subject: A response returned by an myfi-toolkit CLI subcommand or MCP tool call — the raw text/JSON an agent receives back after invoking a toolkit capability (e.g. describe_toolkit, stats, quote).

dimensions.desc: The tool's name/description/output tells an agent, without extra guessing, what it does and when to call it.
Output is structured (JSON or clearly delimited text) an agent can parse programmatically, not free-form prose.
Output gives the agent enough to act on immediately (a concrete value, list, or next step) rather than forcing another round trip.

guidance: Reward toolkit responses that are self-describing, structured, and immediately usable by a calling agent. Penalize vague prose, missing fields, or output that forces the agent to guess the schema.
